steps.title: Use the prediction clue
steps.content: The second sentence says Hale's parents would have been correct if they had made a prediction when he was born. The blank must mean expect or predict in advance.

steps.title: Choose the expectation word
steps.content: Choice A would suggest disagreement, not prediction. Choice B means disregard. Choice C means demand or need, which does not fit parents imagining a future career. The word meaning expect beforehand sets up the contrast. The answer is D.
